message:
fix: resolve clippy warnings and add obligation leak response setter

- Add RuntimeState::set_obligation_leak_response() for builder integration
- Fix clippy::too_many_arguments on ObligationRecord::with_description_and_context
- Fix clippy::redundant_clone on acquire_backtrace in obligation creation
- Fix clippy::same_item_push in HPACK test using repeat_n
- Fix clippy::single_match and unused variable warnings in leak diagnostics
- Apply cargo fmt across codebase
- Close completed epics: bd-e71n (Scheduler Wakeup), bd-1bic (HTTP/2 Security), bd-qhai (Sync Primitives)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
